A.evidence: Faithful prose with well-formed LaTeX equations (1-6), but citation-link artifacts like `[Kalchbrenner and Blunsom](#page-10-0)` are injected inline and accents are garbled (Montr´eal´, Neco...˜); no Table 1 reached in excerpt.

B.evidence: Cleanest prose, no citation-link noise, proper `$...$` math and correct heading order incl. Fig 3 caption; only nit is occasional subscript simplification (T_x rendered as T); Table 1 not rendered as a grid.

C.evidence: Text mostly faithful but has OCR errors ("Kalchbrneren", "Èneco") and math subscripts are mangled with escaped markup (`h$\_{t}$`); figures reduced to "Line chart"/"<!-- image -->" placeholders.

D.evidence: Every display equation emitted as `<!-- formula-not-decoded -->` (math absent), glyph corruption ("glyph[latticetop]"), and Fig. 3 alignment-matrix words scrambled into gibberish columns ("L' L .a = ent ela on de ord de...").
